message:
interactive: input event dispatch with transform/block response handling

Major refactoring of input submission to support extension input events:

New PiMsg variant:
- UpdateLastUserMessage(String): updates displayed user message after
  transform or block, enabling UI consistency with actual sent content

Input event dispatch:
- dispatch_input_event: async helper that fires Input event with text,
  images, and source fields, returns InputEventOutcome
- Calls apply_input_event_response to interpret extension response

Content block helpers:
- split_content_blocks_for_input: extracts (text, images) from blocks
- build_content_blocks_for_input: reconstructs blocks from (text, images)

submit_content_with_display changes:
- Removed input_text_override parameter (no longer needed)
- Input event dispatch moved into spawn block for proper async handling
- On Continue: updates content if transformed, fires UpdateLastUserMessage
- On Block: displays "[input blocked]", fires AgentError with reason
- BeforeAgentStart event now fires after input event resolution

submit_message changes:
- Same input event dispatch pattern as submit_content_with_display
- Handles text-only input path with image support via InputEventOutcome

Extension event dispatch filtering:
- AgentStart, AgentEnd, TurnStart, TurnEnd events now dispatched by
  agent.rs directly; interactive.rs skips these to prevent duplicates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
